title: Overcoming Panic and Fear
immediate_steps: Accept the reality of the situation (denial gets people killed)
Focus on immediate, achievable tasks (e.g., 'I just need to build a fire right now')
Talk to yourself out loud to maintain focus and combat loneliness
Remember that humans are highly resilient and capable of surviving extreme conditions
Maintain a positive mental attitude (PMA); it is the single most important survival tool
avoid: Do not give up (apathy is a killer)
Do not focus on the 'big picture' if it causes despair; break survival into small steps
